Originally from Cloudmarsh Isle, Ravinder Tickoo has established himself in Horizonmist Shuttle as a leading innovator. He is best known for his invention, the Umbra Link Array, which has received much praise from the industry. His work has earned him the esteemed Ruby Mast Emblem, reflecting his dedication to progress.
